name: Dragon Ball
description: Akira Toriyama's Saiyan saga — Goku, Vegeta, Frieza, and four decades of orange gi.

questions.q: Who created the 'Dragon Ball' manga?
In what year did the Dragon Ball manga debut in Japan?

source.notes: First serialized in Weekly Shōnen Jump on November 20, 1984.

questions.q: Which classic Chinese novel was Toriyama's main inspiration for Dragon Ball?

source.notes: Goku is loosely based on the Monkey King, Sun Wukong.

questions.q: Who is the protagonist of Dragon Ball?
How many Dragon Balls must be gathered to summon the wish-granting dragon Shenron?

source.notes: Each is marked with a number of stars from 1 to 7.

questions.q: Who is Goku's first major companion in the series, who builds the Dragon Radar?

source.notes: Capsule Corporation heiress; later marries Vegeta.

questions.q: Who is Goku's first martial arts master, the inventor of the Kamehameha?

source.notes: Also known as the Turtle Hermit (Kame-Sen'nin).

questions.q: What alien warrior race is Goku revealed to belong to in Dragon Ball Z?
What is the name of Goku's home planet, destroyed by Frieza?

source.notes: Renamed after the Saiyan king. Also home to Prince Vegeta.

questions.q: Who is Goku's older brother, the first major villain in Dragon Ball Z?

source.notes: Killed in a sacrifice play by Piccolo (with Goku) in DBZ episode 5.

questions.q: Goku first achieves Super Saiyan transformation while fighting which villain?

source.original_a: The epic battle between Goku and Frieza on Planet Namek

questions.q: Who is Goku's primary rival turned ally throughout the franchise?
What is the name of Goku's signature energy attack?

source.notes: The Spirit Bomb (Genki-dama) is Goku's other signature attack — gathered from all living beings.

questions.q: What is Goku's older son's name?

source.notes: Named after Goku's adoptive grandfather. Marries Videl; has daughter Pan.

questions.q: What is Goku's younger son's name?

source.notes: Best friends with Trunks; together they fuse into Gotenks.

questions.q: Who is Goku's lifelong best friend and fellow disciple of Master Roshi?
Which Ginyu Force leader has the bizarre ability to switch bodies with opponents?
Which mad scientist created the Red Ribbon Army's Androids and the bio-engineered Cell?

source.notes: Originally Goku's Red Ribbon Army nemesis from Dragon Ball; transformed himself into Android 20.

questions.q: In which Japanese magazine was Dragon Ball originally serialized?

source.notes: Published by Shueisha; ran from 1984 to 1995.

questions.q: In which year did the original 'Dragon Ball' anime first air?

source.notes: Aired on Fuji TV starting February 26, 1986.
